title: Branch Card
description: Output of Stage 2 (ideation) for a single branch. Each of the three branches produces one of these. Populated/enriched by Stage 3 (literature grounding).

research_question.description: The specific research question this branch would answer. Not a paraphrase of another branch.

intervention_primitive.description: The core mechanism of the intervention. Must differ in kind from other branches, not merely in UI surface.

human_system_relationship.description: Normative stance on who does what.

method_family.description: The HCI research tradition this branch sits inside.

one_sentence_claim.description: Single sentence describing the contribution if this research succeeds.

why_divergent.description: Explicit statement of why this branch differs from the other two on the four divergence axes.

grounding.description: Populated by Stage 3. Empty after Stage 2.

source_card.description: Must match a YAML file in corpus/source_cards/<id>.yaml

quoted_claim.description: A claim drawn from the source card's allowed_claims list.
